mnemonics.title: IoT Functional Blocks
mnemonics.content: D.C.D.A - Device, Communicate, Data, App. This represents the flow: Devices sense/act, Data is Communicated, stored/processed as Data, and presented in an App.

mnemonics.title: MQTT Components
mnemonics.content: Please Bring Snacks - Publisher, Broker, Subscriber.

mnemonics.title: Protocol Selection Criteria
mnemonics.content: R.P.D - Range, Power, Data rate. When choosing a protocol, consider its Range, Power consumption, and required Data rate.
